ValidationRule.description: ( #start of group #1 [0-9] # start with 0-9 |‚Äã # OR‚Äã 0[0-9] ‚Äã ‚Äã# 00-09 |‚Äã # OR‚Äã 1[0-9]‚Äã ‚Äã # 10-19 |‚Äã # OR‚Äã 2‚Äã ‚Äã[0-3]‚Äã ‚Äã# 20-23 ) #end of group #1 : # follow by a semi colon (:) [0-5][0-9] # foll‚Äão‚Äãw by 0..5 and 0..9
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Please enter time in the format hh:mm (00:01 - 23:59) (TC018)
